title: citrus gordonii
intro: Citrus gordonii, also known as the citron, is a citrus plant native to Southeast Asia, characterized by its thick, bumpy skin and sour pulp. The medicinal properties of Citrus gordonii include its high concentration of flavonoids, limonoids, and coumarins, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Citrus gordonii are attributed to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help reduce the risk of chronic diseases such as heart disease and cancer. Citrus gordonii is often prepared as an herbal tea, juice, or extract, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems.
